_Expert_ _Faculty_

## _Meet_ the _Teachers_ Behind _Mentora_

Certified educators guiding _IGCSE_ & _American_ curriculum students to excellence.

![Meet the Teachers Behind Mentora](https://www.mentoraeg.com/images/Mentora-banner-1200.webp?v=1781191248)

Expert Faculty • Meet Your Teachers • Mentora •Expert Faculty • Meet Your Teachers • Mentora •Expert Faculty • Meet Your Teachers • Mentora •Expert Faculty • Meet Your Teachers • Mentora •

## Choose Your Curriculum

Select the educational pathway that matches your academic goals

### IGCSE

International General Certificate of Secondary Education courses designed for excellence


CambridgeOxford AQAPearson Edexcel

[Explore Courses](https://www.mentoraeg.com/topics?curriculum=igcse)

### AMERICAN

Comprehensive American curriculum courses aligned with US educational standards


ACTSATEST

[Explore Courses](https://www.mentoraeg.com/topics?curriculum=american)

### IB

International Baccalaureate programs fostering critical thinking and global perspectives


IB PreparationTheory of KnowledgeExtended Essay

[Coming Soon](https://www.mentoraeg.com/#)

### FOUNDATION

University foundation programs online at top universities worldwide with official partnerships in countries like the UK


Global UniversitiesOfficial Partners

[Coming Soon](https://www.mentoraeg.com/#)

## Why Choose Our Platform

Everything you need to succeed academically

### Quality Content

All courses precisely aligned with IGCSE and American curriculum standards


### Expert Instructors

Learn from qualified educators with years of teaching experience


### Flexible Learning

Study at your own pace, anytime and anywhere with 24/7 access


### Track Progress

Monitor your advancement with detailed analytics and assessments


## Find the Perfect Course for Your Academic Journey

Choose from a wide range of curriculum-aligned courses with new content added regularly to support your learning goals


[Discover Courses](https://www.mentoraeg.com/courses)

## Your Path to Academic Excellence

Launching soon with comprehensive curriculum-aligned courses

##### Accredited Programs

##### HD Video Lessons

##### Proven Results

##### 24/7 Support

### Become an Instructor

Share your expertise with students worldwide. Teach IGCSE or American curriculum courses and make an impact.


[Start Teaching Today](https://www.mentoraeg.com/dashboard/courses/new)

### Discover New Knowledge

Expand your academic skills with courses designed for IGCSE and American students. Stay ahead in your studies.


[Find New Courses](https://www.mentoraeg.com/courses)

**Cookies and analytics** We use cookies to measure site traffic and improve your experience. You can accept analytics or reject non-essential cookies. See our Privacy & Cookie policy for details.

Reject

Accept


#### About Us

Mentora is a premier LMS platform connecting expert teachers with students globally. We deliver high-quality IGCSE and American curriculum courses in an engaging, accessible format.


![Edres - Education Recruitment Services](https://www.mentoraeg.com/images/edres_logo_H_black.png)

Mentora operates as part of the Edres group


#### Contact

__llm_logo_reasoning.reasoning: Selected #0 because it is visible, located in the header, and links to the homepage, matching the brand 'Mentoraeg'.

primary.reasoning: Button #1 'Discover Courses' is prominently placed and uses a vibrant blue color, making it a strong candidate for the primary CTA.

secondary.reasoning: Button #7 'All Courses' has a transparent background with a blue outline, making it a suitable secondary CTA with a different color group.
